t_ch: （情况有些怪异，还是去神策府找青镞商量一下吧。）
t_en: (This doesn't seem right, I'd better talk to Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight.)

t_ch: 放在一旁
t_en: Put it aside.

t_ch: （倒不是信不过丹枢…但这种东西，真的可以随便吃吗？）
t_en: (It's not that I don't trust Dan Shu... but this doesn't seem like something I should take lightly.)

t_ch: （情况有些怪异，还是去神策府找青镞商量一下吧。）
t_en: (Something feels off — I'd better talk to Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight.)

t_ch: （呃…头又开始疼起来了…丹枢给我的「餐云承露丹」不会真的有问题吧？）
t_en: (Argh... There goes my head again... Is Dan Shu sure this Brumedew is safe for consumption?)

t_ch: （怎么回事？这儿不是神策府吗？神策府怎么会出现这么多魔阴身……）
t_en: (What's happening? Isn't this the Seat of Divine Foresight? Why are there so many mara-struck here...)

t_ch: （不…不能让他们…靠过来……）
t_en: (No... I can't let them... get near me...)

t_ch: 太好了，你终于清醒过来了。我还以为要出大事了，惊得一身冷汗。
t_en: Thank the stars, you're finally awake. I thought we might lose you, I was so worried.

t_ch: 我刚才怎么了？
t_en: What happened to me?

t_ch: 你走进神策府，突然开始挥舞武器。
t_en: You came into the Seat of Divine Foresight and started brandishing your weapon.

t_ch: 对不起，我不是故意的…
t_en: I'm sorry, I didn't mean to...

t_ch: 我完全不记得发生了什么…
t_en: I don't remember anything at all...

t_ch: 你失控的样子和那些堕入魔阴身的同胞…一模一样。
t_en: It looked like you'd lost control, as if you'd been stricken with mara...

t_ch: 我猜其中必有隐情。在你来到神策府之前，到底发生了什么事？
t_en: There has to be something awry. Tell me what happened to you before arriving at the Seat of Divine Foresight.

t_ch: 你向青镞讲述了与丹枢之间发生的一切。
t_en: You recount everything that happened between you and Dan Shu to Qingzu.

t_ch: 听你描述，她送你的礼物，与「药王秘传」的诡异丹方同出一炉……
t_en: From what you're saying, it seems like the gift she gave to you must be related to the Disciples' prescription we examined earlier...

t_ch: 不过奇怪的很…来检查你身体的医士却说，你的身体机能并未受什么影响。
t_en: ...but the healer who examined you just now said your body doesn't seem to have been affected... how strange.

t_ch: 这是她在戏弄你？还是说，她的药在你身上失手了？我建议你之后来复查一下，毕竟药王秘传的「仙药」，谁也说不好有什么「疗效」。
t_en: Could Dan Shu be playing a trick on you? Or is her medicine somehow not working as planned? My advice is to come back later for another examination... It's a Disciples of Sanctus Medicus prescription after all — who knows what "healing" effects it may have.

t_ch: 我会立刻传令通缉丹枢的。如果你有找到她的线索，也欢迎随时与我联系。
t_en: I'll put out a wanted notice for Dan Shu immediately. If you find any trace of her, get in touch with me.

t_ch: 带着这个谛听吧，也许能帮你找到这位…「朋友」。
t_en: Take this Diting with you, it might just help you find this... "friend."

t_ch: 我理解你的心情…我也曾被「朋友」欺骗过，那滋味很不好受。
t_en: I understand how you feel... I've also been fooled by someone I regarded as a good friend. It's a dreadful experience.

t_ch: 如果我们能找到丹枢，也许能让你当面向她讨个说法吧。
t_en: If we can find Dan Shu, we might be able to confront her and get some answers.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，好久不见。今天来神策府有何贵干？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, it's been a while. To what does the Seat of Divine Foresight owe the pleasure?

t_ch: 你向青镞讲述了与丹枢之间发生的一切。
t_en: You recount everything that happened between you and Dan Shu to Qingzu.

t_ch: 我明白了…听你的描述，你怀疑她送你这丸药的用意？
t_en: I understand... You say you have suspicions about this pellet she gave you?

t_ch: 这样吧，你把那个「餐云承露丹」交给我，我去找人化验。
t_en: How about this, leave this Brumedew Concentrate Pellet with me, and I'll find someone to run a few tests on it.

t_ch: （交出「餐云承露丹」）
t_en: (Hand over the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet)

t_ch: 我得找一位可信任的丹士。要劳烦你在这儿等我片刻。眼下的局势里，还真不容易找到像你这样可以完全信任的人……
t_en: I need to find a trustworthy alchemist, so you'll need to wait here a while. It isn't easy to find trustworthy people like yourself in these perilous times.

t_ch: 青镞转身离开。你在神策府等了许久，才看到她匆匆折返回来。
t_en: Qingzu turns around and leaves. It was a long time before she returns to the Seat of Divine Foresight hurriedly.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，万幸你足够警觉，没有服下这丸药。丹士们在其中验出了诸多禁忌成分，与之前那张「药王秘传」的诡异丹方同出一炉……
t_en: Thank the stars you were wise enough not take that pellet, {NICKNAME} — my alchemists were able to extract many forbidden components. The result... is identical to the Disciples' mysterious prescription...

t_ch: 还是很难相信丹枢骗了我…
t_en: I can't believe Dan Shu lied to me...

t_ch: 完全理解，希望你不要太难过。
t_en: I understand, try not to be too upset.

t_ch: 我明白了，这就去找她。
t_en: I see. In that case, I'll go look for her now.

t_ch: 虽说早就料到丹鼎司内有内鬼，但没想到是如此身居高位者……
t_en: I had a suspicion that there might be a spy in the Alchemy Commission, but I never expected it to be someone so high up in the organization...

t_ch: 我会立刻传令通缉丹枢的。如果你有找到她的线索，也欢迎随时与我联系。
t_en: I'll put out a wanted notice for Dan Shu immediately. If you find any trace of her, get in touch with me.

t_ch: 带上这个谛听吧，也许能帮你找到这位…「朋友」。
t_en: Take this Diting with you, it might just help you find this... "friend."

t_ch: 虽说早就料到丹鼎司内有内鬼，但没想到是如此身居高位者……
t_en: I had a suspicion that there might be a spy in the Alchemy Commission, but I never expected it to be someone so high up in the organization...

t_ch: 我一直以为她是朋友…
t_en: I thought she was my friend...

t_ch: 我理解你的心情…我也曾被「朋友」欺骗过，那滋味很不好受。
t_en: I understand how you feel... I've also been fooled by someone I regarded as a good friend. It's a dreadful experience.

t_ch: 我早看出她有问题。
t_en: I knew there was something off about her.

t_ch: 你很谨慎，这非常好。切记不要让私人情感影响了你的判断。
t_en: You're prudent, and that's a good trait to have. Just try not to let your emotions cloud your judgment.

t_ch: （丹枢不在这里…该去哪里找她呢？）
t_en: (Dan Shu isn't here... Where could she be?)

t_ch: （对了，丹枢给我的药盒上残留了她的气息，用青镞给我的谛听找找看吧。）
t_en: (I've got it. Dan Shu's medicine box has her scent on it — I'll ask the Diting that Qingzu lent me to track her.)

t_ch: 谛听循着丹枢的气息，将你引导到了工造司。
t_en: The Diting follows Dan Shu's scent and leads you to the Artisanship Commission.

t_ch: （那是…丹枢…既然她和一群药王秘传在一起，那么情况大约就是如此了吧……）
t_en: (That's... Dan Shu... with a group of Disciples... I guess that tells me all I need to know...)

t_ch: 魁首大人，请您退后，我来处理这家伙。
t_en: Master, stand back. Let me handle this.

t_ch: 无妨，{F#她}{M#他}是我的朋友。
t_en: Stand down, {F#she}{M#he} is my friend.

t_ch: 不少兄弟姐妹都折在{F#她}{M#他}手里了！
t_en: Many of our brethren have fallen by {F#her}{M#his} hands!

t_ch: 我知道。
t_en: Yes, I am aware.

t_ch: 可是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 我说了，{F#她}{M#他}是我的朋友。退下。
t_en: I said, {F#she}{M#he} is my friend. Leave us.

t_ch: 是…魁首大人……
t_en: ...Yes, master.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，没想到你会来找我。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I didn't expect you to come looking for me.

t_ch: 他们叫你「魁首」。
t_en: They call you "master."

t_ch: 的确如此。在下是药王秘传众兄弟姐妹之首，是慈怀药王的子裔，我们会带领整个仙舟联盟走向「丰饶」的道路。
t_en: So they do. I am Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, scion of Merciful Medicus, and I shall lead the entire Xianzhou Alliance onto the Path of Abundance.

t_ch: 你是药王秘传的老大？
t_en: You're the head of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

t_ch: 老大？真是粗鄙的称呼。在下是药王秘传众兄弟姐妹之首，是慈怀药王的子裔，我们会带领整个仙舟联盟走向「丰饶」的道路。
t_en: The head? What a crude way of putting it. I am Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, scion of Merciful Medicus, and I shall lead the entire Xianzhou Alliance onto the Path of Abundance.

t_ch: 你骗了我。
t_en: You lied to me.

t_ch: 很抱歉…在下骗了你很多事，但在下只为骗你吃那副药的事道歉。至于其他的谎言，只是为了能和你平等地交流。
t_en: I lied to you about many things... but I reserve my apology only for deceiving you into taking the medicine. As for the other falsehoods, they were merely in aid of communicating as equals.

t_ch: 你吃了我给你的「餐云承露丹」吗？
t_en: Did you ingest the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet I gave you?

t_ch: 我吃了。
t_en: I did.

t_ch: 你体会到转变了吗？多少求药使抵达仙舟，渴望求取不死仙方，却无功而返。
t_en: Did you feel the shift? So many Elixir Seekers arrive on the Xianzhou in the hope of obtaining the formula to immortality, but none have succeeded.

t_ch: 但他们猜的没错，仙舟确实保留着转变为长生种的秘密。我很欣赏你，想把这样的机会留给你。
t_en: Their aspirations are well-founded. The Xianzhou does indeed harbor the secret to becoming immortal. I admire you, so I thought I'd give you the chance to obtain it.

t_ch: 服下「餐云承露丹」，你就能切身体会到慈怀药王为血肉之躯带来的无限自由。
t_en: Upon ingesting the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet, you will feel the limitless freedom of the form bestowed upon you by Merciful Medicus...

t_ch: 你听起来似乎并无异状？你的呼吸并没有变得更绵长，气息也不像是经历过变化的样子…？
t_en: ...and yet — you don't sound any different. Your breaths are not prolonged, and your presence doesn't feel like it's been altered in any way...

t_ch: 为什么？你的体质与常人不同吗？
t_en: Why is that? Is your constitution somehow different from the average person?

t_ch: 我体内寄宿着星核。
t_en: I host a Stellaron inside me.

t_ch: 星核？这不可能。
t_en: A Stellaron...? That's impossible.

t_ch: 就算这是真的。以短生种的躯壳寄宿星核，恐怕只是凶多吉少。看来你注定与长生无缘。
t_en: Even if what you say is true, to host a Stellaron as a short-life species would only spell an early demise. It looks like you are not fated to live a long life.

t_ch: 我没必要回答你。
t_en: I don't need to answer you.

t_ch: 看来你还没有原谅在下…在下对此并无怨言。
t_en: Looks like you have yet to forgive me... I understand.

t_ch: 我没吃。
t_en: I didn't.

t_ch: 在下很欣赏你的谨慎…可惜了。多少求药使抵达仙舟，渴望求取不死仙方，却无功而返。
t_en: I admire your vigilance... What a shame. So many Elixir Seekers arrive on the Xianzhou in the hope of obtaining the formula to immortality, but none have succeeded.

t_ch: 他们猜的没错，仙舟确实保留着转变为长生种的秘密。我很欣赏你，想把这样的机会留给你。
t_en: Their aspirations are well-founded. The Xianzhou does indeed harbor the secret to becoming immortal. I admire you, so I thought I'd give you the chance to obtain it.

t_ch: 「餐云承露丹」会将你转变为长生种，并让你体会慈怀药王为血肉之躯带来的无限自由。但你似乎无福消受啊。
t_en: The Brumedew Concentrate Pellet will turn you into a long-life species — you will feel the limitless freedom of the form bestowed upon you by Merciful Medicus... By not taking it, you are foregoing its benefits.

t_ch: 这真的很遗憾…身为朋友，在下尊重你的选择。
t_en: Such a pity... though as your friend, I respect your choice.

t_ch: 那究竟是什么药？
t_en: What kind of medicine is it, exactly?

t_ch: 是求药使抵达仙舟，梦寐以求的不死仙方。它能赐予短生种转变，将你变成「仙舟人」或是「孽物」——如何称呼，取决你如何看待此事。
t_en: That which the Elixir Seekers that arrive on the Xianzhou dream of — the formula to immortality. To take it is to initiate the transformation from a short-life species into a Xianzhou person or an abomination... depending on your perception.

t_ch: 请你相信在下，在下从没想过要加害于你。我很欣赏你，只是想把长生与自由的机会留给你。
t_en: Please believe me when I say that never once have I thought about harming you... I merely wanted to offer you the chance to obtain immortality and freedom.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，在下恳求你离开罗浮…离开这场争端，事情并不是你看到的那样。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, please, I urge you to leave the Luofu... Abandon this struggle, the truth isn't what it appears to be.

t_ch: 神策府的猎狗是如何向你形容这场内战的？代表正庙正神的帝弓司命，在宇宙中追猎邪神寿瘟祸祖，而药王秘传是邪神的爪牙？
t_en: What did the minions at the Seat of Divine Foresight tell you about this conflict? That the Reignbow Arbiter is the emissary of the righteous? That the Arbiter is chasing the heathen Plagues Author across the stars, while the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus abet their heresy?

t_ch: 事情当真是如此吗？你不了解慈怀药王，也不了解妖弓祸祖，但你了解在下。在你眼里，在下是这样的人吗？
t_en: Do you really think that is the case? You don't understand Merciful Medicus, nor the Devilish Archer Author, but you understand me — do you see me as such? A heretic?

t_ch: 在下不要求你站队…只是希望你能远离罗浮，远离这一切。这一切本就与你无关，我也不想与你为敌。
t_en: I do not ask for you to pick a side... I just wish for you to leave the Luofu — to leave this all behind. This isn't your fight, and I do not wish to make an enemy of you.

t_ch: 现在，请你做出选择吧。你如果放下武器，在下会带着兄弟姐妹们离开这里。如果你执意要与在下战斗，那…在下也愿意奉陪到底。
t_en: Make your choice. If you put away your weapon, I will take my fellow disciples and leave this place. But if you insist upon defying me... then I will have to put an early end to your journey.

t_ch: （放过丹枢）
t_en: (Let Dan Shu go)

t_ch: （与丹枢开战）
t_en: (Battle with Dan Shu)

t_ch: 既然你我都不愿刀兵相向，那么就此别过吧。
t_en: Since neither of us is eager to engage in combat, let us respectfully part ways.

t_ch: 在下这些日子一直在想…妖弓祸祖不是善神，慈怀药王亦不是恶神。你站在景元那边，只是因为你先认识他们罢了。
t_en: I have been thinking... The Devilish Archer Author is not a benevolent god, nor is Merciful Medicus a malevolent one. Your choice to align with Jing Yuan was simply due to meeting him first.

t_ch: 真遗憾啊，如果你先结识的是在下，也许我们就能成为真正的朋友了。
t_en: Most unfortunate. Had you known me first, perhaps we could have been good friends.

t_ch: 魁首大人，我们得走了。
t_en: Master, we should leave now.

t_ch: 在下衷心希望，这是你我二人的永别。
t_en: I sincerely wish that this will be our last meeting.

t_ch: 再见了，无名客。
t_en: Farewell, Nameless.

t_ch: 丹枢带着她的「兄弟姐妹」消失在了道路的尽头。
t_en: Dan Shu and her "brethren" disappear at the end of the street.

t_ch: （唉…去神策府通知一下青镞吧。）
t_en: (*sigh* ...I'd better report my findings to Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight.)

t_ch: 魁首大人，您不能有任何闪失。这种杂事就交给我们来处理吧。
t_en: Master, you must stay out of harm's way. Let us handle this.

t_ch: 魁首大人，请先撤退吧，大业在即，我们不能被{F#她}{M#他}拖在这儿。
t_en: Master, please retreat now. Our main mission is impending. We cannot be stalled here by {F#her}{M#him}.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我想请你先停手。在这里开战，我们只会两败俱伤，而这是在下最不想见到的结果。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, lay down your weapon. Our fighting will only result in mutual suffering — something I would not wish to see.

t_ch: 是你欺骗我在先。
t_en: You were the one who lied to me first.

t_ch: 在下已说过，那只是送给你的一份礼物。
t_en: A lie, yes, but also a gift.

t_ch: 我早晚会抓到你的。
t_en: I'll catch you sooner or later.

t_ch: 这早晚的事，就留到以后再说吧…现在我们各退一步，不要相互为难了。
t_en: If it is to happen sooner or later, I would rather it happen later... Now, let us both take a step back — we needn't make this difficult.

t_ch: 在下这些日子一直在想…妖弓祸祖不是善神，慈怀药王亦不是恶神。你站在景元那边，只是因为你先认识他们罢了。
t_en: I have been thinking... The Devilish Archer Author is not a benevolent god, nor is Merciful Medicus a malevolent one. Your choice to align with Jing Yuan was simply due to meeting him first.

t_ch: 所以…真遗憾啊，如果你先认识的是在下，也许我们就能成为真正的朋友了。
t_en: Most unfortunate. Had you known me first, perhaps we could have been good friends.

t_ch: 魁首大人，我们得走了。
t_en: Master, we should leave now.

t_ch: 在下衷心希望，这是你我二人的永别。
t_en: I sincerely wish that this will be our last meeting.

t_ch: 再见了，无名客。
t_en: Farewell, Nameless.

t_ch: 丹枢带着她的「兄弟姐妹」消失在了道路的尽头。
t_en: Dan Shu and her "brethren" disappear at the end of the street.

t_ch: （唉…去神策府通知一下青镞吧。）
t_en: (*sigh* ...I'd better report my findings to Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight.)

t_ch: 怎么样？你找到丹枢的消息了吗？
t_en: How did it go? Did you manage to locate Dan Shu?

t_ch: 你打断青镞的话头，向她汇报了此前在工造司发生的一切。
t_en: You interrupt Qingzu and report to her everything that happened at the Artisanship Commission.

t_ch: 没能抓住她吗？我明白了。这些家伙潜伏良久，如今终于露出真面目，一定是为了某些更可怕的计划。我得加快搜捕的步伐。
t_en: So you weren't able to apprehend her... I see. These people have been in hiding for so long — they must have a more nefarious plan. I've got to apprehend them quickly.

t_ch: 无论如何，还是感谢你的帮助。我们会根据你的情报去搜捕丹枢的，辛苦你了。
t_en: Once again, thank you for all your help. With your intel, we will put a stop to Dan Shu.

t_ch: 收下这些酬劳吧，这是你应得的。
t_en: Take this as a token of my appreciation. You deserve it.

t_ch: 这些家伙潜伏良久，如今终于露出真面目，一定是为了某些更可怕的计划。我得加快搜捕的步伐。
t_en: These people have been in hiding for so long — they must have a more nefarious plan. I've got to apprehend them quickly.

t_ch: 小瞎子，上楼台！
t_en: Little miss lady, can't see ahead!

t_ch: 上得去，下不来！
t_en: Can't see right, can't see left!

t_ch: 叽里咕噜滚下来！
t_en: Heads to the east, ends up west!

t_ch: （这就是丹枢让我找的孩子吧？她来这儿是为同样眼盲的孩子看诊送药吗？）
t_en: (Is this the one Dan Shu sent me to find? Does she come here to treat other sightless people?)

t_ch: 出来吧，小谛听。帮我找到丹枢吧。
t_en: Time to come out, little Diting. I need you to help me find Dan Shu.

t_ch: 听景元说，你受他所托，即将前往丹鼎司与太卜大人率领的大军汇合。我这里就不多耽误你的时间了，请一定要注意安全。
t_en: Jing Yuan tells me you'll be joining the forces led by the Alchemy Commission and master diviner — I won't take up any more of your time. Please take good care of yourself.

t_ch: 另外，如果你再次遇到丹枢…请及时通知附近的云骑。
t_en: If you run into Dan Shu again — contact the nearest Cloud Knights.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！你到底怎么了！你们当心点，别伤到{F#她}{M#他}……
t_en: {NICKNAME}! What happened to you? Be careful, don't hurt {F#her}{M#him}...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！快醒醒，你还好吗！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! Wake up, are you okay?

t_ch: （调查这种失踪案应该需要点专业设备…去地衡司借一只谛听吧，它才是专业侦探。）
t_en: (Some professional equipment might come in handy for the investigation of a disappearance case like this... Let me borrow a Diting from the Realm-Keeping Commission. It's the real professional detective.)

t_ch: （贝娜说放生的羊就是在这里失踪的。放出谛听找找看吧，附近也许有什么线索。）
t_en: (According to Benna, this is where the released sheep went missing. Let me use Diting to search for clues in this area.)

t_ch: （脚印…这脚印似乎是兽类留下的，看起来还不止一组。跟着脚印找找看吧，也许会有线索。）
t_en: (Footprints... They seem to belong to an animal, and I think there is more than one pair. Let's follow the footprints for clues.)

t_ch: （大把的红色毛发…上面还沾着血迹……看来，那些小羊毫不意外地遭遇了意外。）
t_en: (A huge tuft of red fur... with blood stains... It seems to be that the sheep have suffered a mishap.)

t_ch: （这是…骨头？更准确地说，应该是骨头渣子…嚼得真碎啊。不知道凶手究竟是什么猛兽。不管是什么，这玩意儿牙口肯定不错。）
t_en: (Is this... a bone? To be more precise, it's the scraps of a bone... It's been chewed to such fine pieces. Whatever beast is the culprit, I'm sure it's got strong teeth.)

t_ch: （狼？鳞渊境里还有这种东西？先过去看看吧。）
t_en: (A wolf? Does it even exist in the Scalegorge Waterscape? Let me check it out.)

t_ch: （楠楠在那边…但似乎没看到钟珊和其他人…先去问问楠楠吧。）
t_en: (Nannan is there... but I can't see Zhongshan and the rest... Let me ask Nannan first.)

t_ch: （这个净砚真是自说自话…回去和那几个「放生帮」聊聊吧，不知道他们是否决定好给我准备什么试炼了。）
t_en: (Jingyan is literally talking to herself... I should probably go back and talk to the members of the Unshackled. I wonder whether they have decided on the kind of trial to put me through.)

t_ch: （怎么突然联系不上钟珊了…不会真出什么事了吧？去鳞渊境看看吧，「放生帮」似乎经常在那里集会……）
t_en: (Why can't I reach Zhongshan... Has something bad happened? Let me check out the Scalegorge Waterscape, where the Unshackled members often gather...)

t_ch: （楠楠在那边…但似乎没看到钟珊和其他人…先去问问楠楠吧。）
t_en: (Nannan is there... but I can't see Zhongshan and the rest... Let me ask Nannan first.)

t_ch: （钟珊这家伙到底在搞什么鬼，去机巧鸟架那儿看看吧。）
t_en: (What on earth is Zhongshan up to? Let me take a look at the cycrane stand.)

t_ch: 罚款…呜呜…
t_en: I'm fined? Sob, sob...

t_ch: 我的棺材本…
t_en: My savings...

t_ch: 别…别动我…
t_en: Don't... Don't touch me...

t_ch: 太用力了…疼…
t_en: You're hurting me...

t_ch: 那棵树比我年纪还大
t_en: That tree is older than me.

t_ch: 对不起…军爷…
t_en: I'm sorry, sir...

t_ch: 我的法乌努斯红毛羊，是不是都让你给我抓走了！
t_en: Did you steal my Faunus Red Sheep?

t_ch: 不要再在这里纠缠了，小心我去地衡司告你诽谤罪。
t_en: Don't make a scene here, or I'll sue you for slander at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 你没抓我的法乌努斯红毛羊，那你的店里最近怎么多了这么多羊肉菜？
t_en: If you didn't steal my Faunus Red Sheep, why are there suddenly so many lamb dishes on your shop's menu?

t_ch: 这段时间是浮羊出栏的时节啊！我这里进了不少上好的浮羊，那当然是多了很多羊肉菜了啊。
t_en: It's the season when the Puffergoats are ready! I've purchased lots of premium Puffergoats, which explains why there are so many goat dishes at my place.

t_ch: 再者说，罗浮上有羊肉菜的店多了，你凭什么在这里纠缠我啊？
t_en: Also, there are plenty of restaurants on the Luofu that offer lamb dishes. Why do you only look for my trouble?

t_ch: 他们那里的羊肉都没你这里的好吃，你让我怎么相信你这里只是普通的浮羊肉！
t_en: Their lamb don't taste as good as yours. I find it hard to believe you only use ordinary Puffergoat meat in your food!

t_ch: 我们「至味盛苑」这样菜肴品质的店，才不可能去抓什么来路不明的野羊来做菜。
t_en: For the Garden of Gourmet's prestige, we'll never use stray sheep from unknown sources as ingredient for our food.

t_ch: 才不是什么「来路不明的野羊」，是法乌努斯红毛羊！
t_en: It's not a stray sheep! It's the Faunus Red Sheep!

t_ch: 我管你什么法什么羊，反正跟我没关系。别在这儿捣乱了，神经病！
t_en: I don't care what it's called, cos it's not my business. Just stop causing trouble here, you nutcase!

t_ch: 唉…我可怜的法乌努斯红毛羊啊，离开残酷的兽栏还没几天，没来得及过上几天逍遥自在的好日子，就…唉，救苦救难的丰饶之主，可不要为此罚没我的功德啊……
t_en: Alas, my poor Faunus Red Sheep. They didn't even get to enjoy much freedom after leaving the harsh pen... Oh, Aeon of Abundance who spares us from suffering, please don't forfeit my merit for this!

t_ch: 丰饶之主？
t_en: Aeon of Abundance?

t_ch: 你们是药王秘传？
t_en: Are you the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

t_ch: 嘘，能不能小点声？我可是本本分分客居在此的化外民，和「药王秘传」没有半点关系。
t_en: Shh, can you keep your voice low? I'm just an outworlder who lives here and keeps to myself. I have nothing to do with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

t_ch: 你好，我叫贝娜，平时工作之余会和几个化外民朋友一起放生一些小生命。
t_en: Greetings, my name is Benna. I like to set animals free with some of my outworlder friends when I have the time.

t_ch: 我跟你说啊，我可和那帮打着「丰饶」旗号杀人越货的坏东西不一样。恰恰相反，我和我的朋友们是在用实际行动践行「丰饶」之道向善的那一面！
t_en: Let me make it clear that I'm different from those evil people who kill and steal in the name of Abundance. On the contrary, my friends and I are practicing the virtuous side of Abundance with our actions!

t_ch: 那你纠缠人家高唐干什么？
t_en: Why are you bothering Gao Tang then?

t_ch: 因为我放生的法乌努斯红毛羊丢了啊！那些红彤彤的小羊在故乡濒临灭绝，我重金买下一大堆，想将它们放生到了鳞渊境……
t_en: It's because the Faunus Red Sheep I released have gone missing! The lovely sheep with crimson wool is an endangered species in their home. So, I've spent a fortune to buy a herd of them, thinking of releasing them into the Scalegorge Waterscape...

t_ch: 可我最近想回去看看时，却发现它们全都不见了！
t_en: But when I went back home to check on them, I realized they were all gone!

t_ch: 唉！这时候要是能突然出现一位擅长调查事情真相的高人就好了…那位高人恰好还心胸宽广，甚至愿意免费帮助我们这些行善的好人……
t_en: Alas, it would be great if an expert investigator could suddenly show up here... I wish the investigator would be generous and willing to help kind people like us gratuitously...

t_ch: 你说的正是鄙人。
t_en: That's me.

t_ch: 你…您能帮我调查法乌努斯红毛羊失踪的真相？哎哟，怪不得，我见您第一面就觉得您面慈心善！
t_en: You... Could you help me find out the truth behind the disappearance of the Faunus Red Sheep? I knew you were a kind soul the first time I met you!

t_ch: 不过不免费。
t_en: But my help isn't gratuitous.

t_ch: 关于报酬…
t_en: About my pay...

t_ch: 上来就谈钱？也太功利了吧？我重金放生那些小羊时可没想着问它们收费啊。
t_en: That's so mercenary of you. When I released the sheep, I never thought of asking them for my money back.

t_ch: 要知道，你帮了我，就是帮了那些下落不明的小羊。如此你便在丰饶之主那儿累积了功德福报。往后你的人生便会身体健康，好运连连！
t_en: You should know that by helping me, you're helping those missing sheep too, and that will earn you merit with the Aeon of Abundance. You'll be in good health and have great luck in the future.

t_ch: 没错，我想要的福报就是钱。
t_en: That's right. Money is the only reward I want.

t_ch: 功德？可以吃吗？
t_en: What's merit? Can you eat it?

t_ch: 行行行。我明白了，羊要吃草，人要吃好。既然有人愿意放弃功德，兑换成更直接、更冰冷的信用点数字，那么我就满足{F#她}{M#他}好了。
t_en: Fine, I get it. Both sheep and humans have to eat well to survive. Since someone is willing to give up merits in exchange for cold hard credits, I'll fulfill {F#her}{M#his} wish.

t_ch: 给钱我就能帮你。
t_en: Pay me, and I'll help you.

t_ch: 上来就谈钱？也太功利了吧？我重金放生那些小羊时可没想着问他们收费啊。
t_en: That's so mercenary of you. When I released the sheep, I never thought of asking them for my money back.

t_ch: 要知道，你帮了我，就是帮了那些下落不明的小羊。如此你便在丰饶之主那儿累积了功德福报。往后你的人生便会身体健康，好运连连！
t_en: You should know that by helping me, you're helping those missing sheep too, and that will earn you merit with the Aeon of Abundance. You'll be in good health and have great luck in the future.

t_ch: 没错，我想要的福报就是钱。
t_en: That's right. Money is the only reward I want.

t_ch: 功德？可以吃吗？
t_en: What's merit? Can you eat it?

t_ch: 行行行。我明白了，羊要吃草，人要吃好。既然有人愿意放弃功德，兑换成更直接、更冰冷的信用点数字，那么我就满足{F#她}{M#他}好了。
t_en: Fine, I get it. Both sheep and humans have to eat well to survive. Since someone is willing to give up merits in exchange for cold hard credits, I'll fulfill {F#her}{M#his} wish.

t_ch: 交换一下联系方式吧，我手头还有其他生意要处理…法乌努斯红毛羊的事就交给您了。
t_en: Let's exchange numbers to keep in touch. As I have other businesses to manage, I'll leave the Faunus Red Sheep case to you.

t_ch: 调查有什么进展的话，咱们就在丹鼎司见面吧。
t_en: Let's meet at the Alchemy Commission to discuss updates on the investigation.

t_ch: 今天您来地衡司有何贵干呢？
t_en: What brings you to the Realm-Keeping Commission today?

t_ch: 想要借一只谛听…
t_en: I'd like to borrow a Diting...

t_ch: 您想借一只谛听？能说明一下用途吗？谛听属于办案设备，理论上是不能外借给民间人士的。
t_en: Do you mind telling us the purpose of your loan? Diting is forensic equipment. By right, it can't be lent to civilians.

t_ch: 你谈起贝娜和「法什么玩意红毛羊」的事情。
t_en: You talked about Benna and the matter about the Fau-whatever Red Sheep.

t_ch: 净砚听后，意味深长地叹了口气。
t_en: After listening to you, Jingyan heaves out a meaningful sigh.

t_ch: 又是这样的情况…这谛听确实可以借给您。只不过，等调查告一段落，希望你将结果带回地衡司。
t_en: It happens again... You can borrow this Diting, but you have to submit your result to us after you complete your investigation.

t_ch: 非常感谢！
t_en: Thank you so much!

t_ch: 不必客气，帮助人们解决问题是我的本职工作。
t_en: Don't mention it. It's my job to help people with their problems.

t_ch: 是有什么问题吗？
t_en: Is there a problem?

t_ch: 嗯…不好说，您先去看看情况吧。有什么事我们随时联系。
t_en: Hmm... I'm not sure. Why don't you check out the situation first? Just drop me a line if there is a problem.

t_ch: 虽然以您的身手，不需要我担心，但还是请您注意安全。
t_en: Please be careful, though I know you can probably deal with any danger with your combat skills.

t_ch: 请注意安全，小心行事。有什么事我们随时联系。
t_en: Please stay safe and be careful. Just drop me a line if there is a problem.

t_ch: （脚印…这脚印似乎是兽类留下的，看起来还不止一组。跟着脚印找找看吧，也许会有线索。）
t_en: (Footprints... They seem to belong to an animal, and I think there is more than one pair. Let's follow the footprints for clues.)

t_ch: （大把的红色毛发…上面还沾着血迹……看来，那些小羊毫不意外地遭遇了意外。）
t_en: (A huge tuft of red fur... with blood stains... It seems to be that the sheep have suffered a mishap.)

t_ch: （这是…骨头？更准确地说，应该是骨头渣子…嚼得真碎啊。不知道凶手究竟是什么猛兽。不管是什么，这玩意儿牙口肯定不错。）
t_en: (Is this... a bone? To be more precise, it's the scraps of a bone... It's been chewed to such fine pieces. Whatever beast is the culprit, I'm sure it's got strong teeth.)

t_ch: 你，一顿悄然潜行的午餐。狼群虎视眈眈地看着你，它们饿了。
t_en: You are simply a walking, moving lunch. A pack of wolves watches you hungrily. They are hungry.

t_ch: 我不好吃，去吃那个谛听。
t_en: I don't taste good. Go eat that Diting.
Woof?

t_ch: （准备应战）
t_en: (Get ready to battle.)

t_ch: 你三拳两脚击杀了几匹饿狼，正准备检查一下它们的尸首，却听见身后传来了一个优雅但怪腔怪调的女声。
t_en: It doesn't take you a lot of effort to finish off the hungry wolves. As you were about to check their carcasses, a graceful but sarcastic female voice comes from behind you.

t_ch: 诶呀呀，你把它们给打死了…这可怎么是好？
t_en: Oh, no. You killed them... What shall we do?

t_ch: 总不见得让我喂狼吧？
t_en: I can't feed myself to them, right?

t_ch: 大自然确实没有规定谁生来就是猎物。不过，阁下下手未免太重了吧？人类的聪慧之处就在于，可以根据情况使用有限度的暴力。
t_en: Indeed, nature doesn't dictate who is born to be the prey, but you could have spared their lives. Humans are intelligent because we can decide how much violence to use based on the situation.

t_ch: 是它们先动的手。
t_en: They attacked me first.

t_ch: 它们先动手，就非要下死手不可吗？人类的聪慧之处就在于，可以根据情况使用有限度的暴力。
t_en: Even so, did you really have to kill them? Humans are intelligent because we can decide how much violence to use based on the situation.

t_ch: 自我介绍一下，罗浮上的朋友们都叫我「钟珊」，关系好的也叫我「钟珊珊」。
t_en: Let me introduce myself. My friends on the Luofu called me Zhongshan. Those who are closer to me also called me Zhongshanshan.

t_ch: 朋友啊，你可能不清楚，你方才杀害的是「放生帮」成员放生的小动物。他们以将生命从危险境地中解放出来，任其自由生活为乐事。
t_en: My friend, you may not be aware that you have killed an animal released by the Unshackled. They are a group that enjoys rescuing animals from dangerous situations and releasing them.

t_ch: 不过您刚才这番举动不仅败坏了你的功德，也让某位放生者的一番善举化为乌有…
t_en: Your actions earlier not only undermined your own merit, but also nullified the good deeds of a member of the Unshackled...

t_ch: 现阶段你可能还无法理解「放生帮」的主张，你只要理解「这些狼是有主的」就可以了。
t_en: At this point, you might not be able to understand the belief of the Unshackled. Just be aware that "these wolves are owned by someone." That's it.

t_ch: 您所做的这种事不仅会让放生者伤心，恐怕也会触怒那位好生仁慈的星神啊。
t_en: Your actions earlier not only broke the heart of the Unshackled member, but may have also enraged that merciful Aeon.

t_ch: 星神才不会管你们这些破事…
t_en: Aeons wouldn't care about such trivial matters...

t_ch: 这谁知道呢，天威难测啊。
t_en: Who knows? The will of the divine is unpredictable.

t_ch: 触怒了会怎么样？
t_en: What will happen if I enrage the Aeon?

t_ch: 这谁知道呢，天威难测啊。
t_en: Who knows? The will of the divine is unpredictable.

t_ch: 无妨，我本来就讨厌寿瘟祸祖！
t_en: It doesn't matter, as I already detest the Plagues Author!

t_ch: 喜欢哪位神祇，讨厌哪位神祇，这都是你的自由。但是……
t_en: It's up to you to decide how you feel toward each deity, but...

t_ch: 「放生帮」的成员却不乐见自己辛苦累积的放生功德彻底归零。
t_en: Members of the Unshackled wouldn't be happy to see their hard-earned merits going down the drain.

t_ch: 这样吧，你和我一起去见见「放生帮」的「四大善人」说明情况吧？哦对，现在好像是「三大善人」了……
t_en: Why don't you come with me to meet the Four Benevolent Ones of the Unshackled and explain yourself? Sorry, it's the Three Benevolent Ones now...

t_ch: 再多三、四个人也打不过我。
t_en: Even with three or four helpers, you still aren't my match.

t_ch: 我都说了，不是要找你麻烦，那么警惕做什么。凭你拳毙恶狼的身手，谁能奈何得了你啊？
t_en: I told you I wasn't looking to fight you. Why are you being so uptight? You just killed several wolves unarmed. Who would have the guts to challenge you?

t_ch: 你就把我当成是引荐新人，劝人向善的导师吧？
t_en: Just see me as a tutor who recruits new followers and encourages people to do good.

t_ch: 「四大善人」…我是说「三大善人」，现在应该在丹鼎司那边，咱们一起过去吧。
t_en: The Four Benevolent Ones... Sorry, the Three Benevolent Ones should be at the Alchemy Commission right now. Let's head over there.

t_ch: 这是什么新碰瓷骗局？
t_en: Is this a new scam?

t_ch: 他们多半不会叫你赔偿的，毕竟这些人不看重金钱这样的俗物，却十分重视看不见摸不着的功德。
t_en: I don't think they will ask you for compensation. After all, money means nothing to them. They attach great importance to intangible merits.

t_ch: 接下来要罚款了是吧？
t_en: You will impose a fine on me next?

t_ch: 不不，我不是放生者本人，也不代表罗浮官方，我可没这个权力。
t_en: Not at all. I'm not the one who released the wolves, nor do I represent the Luofu government. So, I don't have the authority to do so.

t_ch: 看，前面那四位就是「放生帮」的「四大善人」了。我先给你介绍一下啊……
t_en: Look, the four people over there are the Four Benevolent Ones of the Unshackled. Let me introduce them to you...

t_ch: 最左边那个女人叫做冬妮娅，是「放生帮」「野兽派」的代表人物，热衷于放生那些强而有力的猛兽。你打死的那些小狼就是她放生的。
t_en: The woman on the left is Tonya, the leading figure of the Beast Faction in the Unshackled and passionate about releasing powerful wild beasts. The wolves you killed were released by her.

t_ch: 然后，旁边那位你应该见过，叫做贝娜。是「保育派」的代表，这一派主要放生一些珍稀、濒临灭绝的弱小动物。
t_en: I think you've met the one next to Tonya. Her name is Benna, and she's the leader of the Nurture Faction. This faction mainly releases rare, fragile, and endangered animals.

t_ch: 接着这位是希斯曼，他呢，是「草叶派」的代表，主要致力于放生植物。
t_en: Next is Heathmann. He leads the Plant Faction that is dedicated to releasing plants.

t_ch: 最后这位，叫楠楠。
t_en: Last but not least, that's Nannan.

t_ch: 这名字也太不整齐了…
t_en: Their names are all over the place...

t_ch: 这位老兄是仙舟本土人。不过他最近被其他三个联合从「四大善人」里除名了。
t_en: This fella is a local, but he's just been jointly ousted from the Four Benevolent Ones by the other three.

t_ch: 因为他致力于放生矿泉水…里的微生物。三位大佬都觉得这种「放生」过于糊弄事，说他是「糊弄派」的，把他给排挤出去了。
t_en: It's because he likes to release... the microorganisms in water. The other three leaders think he's not taking the act of releasing life seriously, so they called him leader of the Fooling Around Faction and kicked him out.

t_ch: 稍等，我来同他们解释解释你的事情。
t_en: Please wait here while I explain your incident to them.

t_ch: 钟珊上前和「四大善人」攀谈了起来。过了一会儿，她转身对你招了招手，示意你过去。
t_en: Zhongshan approaches the Four Benevolent Ones and talks to them. After a while, she turns around and beckons you over.

t_ch: 钟珊，这位就是打算加入咱们「放生帮」的青年才俊吗？
t_en: Zhongshan, is this the young talent who is interested in joining us?

t_ch: 没错，他叫做{NICKNAME}，各位可能略有耳闻…就是神策府那位景元将军请来的贵客。
t_en: Yes, this is {NICKNAME}. Some of you might have heard of that name... This is the distinguished guest invited by General Jing Yuan of the Seat of Divine Foresight.

t_ch: 原来你认得我…
t_en: I see you know who I am...

t_ch: 嗐，你盛名在外，难道自己没有自觉吗？
t_en: Huh? Don't you realize how famous you are?

t_ch: 我什么时候说要加入了？
t_en: When did I say I want to join them?

t_ch: 打从你跟我来见这四位的时候啊？怎么，我以为你愿意跟我来，是存了向善的心意，打算了解「丰饶」之道和放生帮呢？
t_en: When you agreed to come with me and meet them. Didn't you say yes because you wanted to do good and learn more about the way of Abundance and the Unshackled?

t_ch: 等等…这不是我请去调查法乌努斯红毛羊失踪案的那位高人吗？失踪案的真相查清楚了吗？
t_en: Wait a minute... Isn't this the person I hired to investigate the disappearance of the Faunus Red Sheep? Have you got to the bottom of it?

t_ch: 查清楚了，查清楚了。是一群丰饶孽物吃掉了你的那些小羊。不过不用担心，这位{NICKNAME}{F#女侠}{M#少侠}已经把它们都干掉了！
t_en: Yes, yes. It was a bunch of Abominations of Abundance that ate your sheep. Don't worry! This {F#heroine}{M#hero}, {NICKNAME}, already eliminated those monsters!

t_ch: 我说了，是狼先动手…爪的。
t_en: I already told you that wolves attacked first.

t_ch: 没伤着我，不用给医药费了。
t_en: I'm not injured, so there's no need to pay for my medical fees.

t_ch: 是我干的，怎么地吧？
t_en: Yes, I did. So what?

t_ch: 干、干掉了？你竟把我放生那些小狼们都干掉了？这是何等残忍的行径啊！
t_en: E—Eliminated them? You killed the wolves I released? How brutal!

t_ch: 还有你，钟珊！什么叫「丰饶孽物」？我说多少遍了，蒙药师恩赐的那叫「孽物」吗？
t_en: And you, Zhongshan! What do you mean by the "Abominations of Abundance"? How many times do I have to repeat myself? Those that received Yaoshi's blessing are no abominations!

t_ch: 冬妮娅，原来是你干的好事啊！我以为鳞渊境没什么猛兽，才会把法乌努斯红毛羊放生到那里的，你干嘛把那些狼也放生到那儿？
t_en: So, Tonya, you are the culprit! I only released the Faunus Red Sheep in the Scalegorge Waterscape because I thought that area was free of beasts. Why did you release the wolves there too?

t_ch: 你们，都闭嘴。我放生的金边苜蓿，被羊吃光了。
t_en: Shut up, both of you. The gold-fringed alfalfa I released were all eaten by the sheep.

t_ch: 你那些狗屁苜蓿长起来漫山遍野，把那个星球的生态都破坏了，要不然红毛羊至于泛滥成灾吗？红毛羊不泛滥，也就不会被当地猎人捕杀！我也用不着千辛万苦地高价买来放生了！
t_en: Your annoying alfalfa grew all over the place and disrupted the entire ecosystem of that planet! If it hadn't been for your alfalfas, the Faunus Red Sheep population wouldn't have boomed, and they wouldn't have been hunted to near extinction by the local hunters, and I wouldn't have had to buy them at a high price and release them!

t_ch: 好了，不要吵了！当着外人的面，吵吵嚷嚷的，像什么样子？
t_en: Alright, stop bickering! It isn't appropriate to fight before outsiders!

t_ch: 你免开尊口罢！放生矿泉水的小丑！
t_en: Keep your mouth shut, you mineral water-releasing clown!

t_ch: 我放生鳞渊冰泉怎么了？我放生鳞渊冰泉…呃，就不会卷入你们这种莫名其妙的食物链大战！我说你们这到底是在干什么？是在放生啊还是在斗兽啊？
t_en: What's wrong with releasing the Scalegorge Spring Water? At least I won't get embroiled in this ridiculous battle of the food chain! What exactly are you guys doing? Are you releasing animals or holding a beast fight?

t_ch: 请留职察看人员不要在这里扇阴风点鬼火！
t_en: A certain suspended employee shouldn't be fanning the flames here!

t_ch: 你们先吵着，我还有事。
t_en: I'll leave you to your argument.

t_ch: 哎哎哎，你先别走嘛…等我劝劝他们。
t_en: Hey, please don't go... I'll mediate their dispute.

t_ch: 你们就是这样欢迎新人的？
t_en: Is this how you welcome new members?

t_ch: 唉…你别见怪啊，大家都是心中有无比坚定的信仰和信念，才会吵起来的。
t_en: Ahhh... Please don't be offended. We argue only because of the firm conviction we hold in our hearts.

t_ch: 你们打一架吧，我当裁判。
t_en: Why not decide the winner through a fight? I'll be the referee.

t_ch: 别啊，暴力多不好啊。践行「丰饶」之道，要的就是爱惜生命，可不能把自己弄伤啊。
t_en: It's not good to resort to violence. As practitioners of the way of Abundance, we should cherish life instead of hurting ourselves.

t_ch: 好啦，各位，先别吵了。
t_en: Everyone, please stop fighting.

t_ch: 虽然{NICKNAME}打死了冬妮娅放生的狼，让一桩善举泡了汤。但现在{F#她}{M#他}有意将功赎罪，加入「放生帮」，未来自然是功德无量。
t_en: Although {NICKNAME} has killed the wolves released by Tonya and ruined those kind efforts, {F#she}{M#he} intends to redeem this error by joining the Unshackled. They'll do a lot of kind deeds in the future.

t_ch: 不知道各位怎么想？
t_en: How does that sound, everyone?

t_ch: 呜，我的小狼…不！我不同意！
t_en: Sob, sob, my darling wolves... No! I can't accept this!

t_ch: 我没问题，毕竟，{NICKNAME}真的帮我查清了法乌努斯红毛羊的事情。
t_en: I'm fine with it. After all, {NICKNAME} has helped me get to the bottom of the disappearance of the Faunus Red Sheep.

t_ch: 我也不同意啊！这人一看就只会打打杀杀的，哪里晓得「放生」的精义？
t_en: It's nay for me too! This person seems to be violent by nature. Can they understand the spirit of "releasing life"?

t_ch: 住口罢！矿泉水人！哼，我同意{F#她}{M#他}入伙，但我对这家伙的要求会特别严格。
t_en: Enough, mineral water guy! Hmph, I can let {F#her}{M#him} join us, but I'll be especially strict with them.

t_ch: 我，同意。
t_en: I have no problem with that.

t_ch: （似乎有人给我发信息…要不先去回复一下消息吧。）
t_en: (Someone seems to have sent me a message... I should reply to it.)

t_ch: 好极了，三票全通过！我记得加入「放生帮」得有入帮试炼吧？不如我们商量一下这次该为{NICKNAME}安排怎样的试炼吧。
t_en: Awesome! Your membership has been approved unanimously! I remember every new member of the Unshackled has to go through a newcomer trial. Let's discuss the trial to be arranged for {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 钟珊说得有道理，就用「入帮试炼」来考验一下{NICKNAME}好了。
t_en: Zhongshan has a point. Let's test {NICKNAME}'s abilities through the newcomer trial.

t_ch: 重申，我没想加入贵帮。
t_en: Let me reiterate that I have no intention of joining.

t_ch: 那不成，你打死了我的狼，不管入不入会，你都要贡献等量的功德善举，才能让我不计较这事儿。
t_en: That won't do. Now that you have killed my wolves, you must contribute the same amount of merits whether you join our group or not. That's the only way I'll forgive you.

t_ch: 行吧，你们要我做什么？
t_en: Fine. What do I have to do?

t_ch: 我们，细细讨论一下，再告诉你。
t_en: We'll tell you after having a discussion.

t_ch: 似乎有人找我，你们先聊…
t_en: Someone's looking for me. Please go ahead with the discussion...

t_ch: {F#丫头}{M#小子}，你可别走远。你打死了我的狼，不管入不入会，都要贡献等量的功德善举，才能让我不计较这事儿。
t_en: Don't go too far away, {F#girl}{M#boy}. Now that you have killed my wolves, you must contribute the same amount of merits whether you join our group or not. That's the only way I'll forgive you.

t_ch: （唉，不管这些家伙，先瞧瞧谁发来了消息…）
t_en: (Tsk, I'll ignore them and check the message first...)

t_ch: 钟珊和「四大善人」激烈地交流着各自的意见，你一时插不上话。
t_en: As Zhongshan and the Four Benevolent Ones hold an animated discussion, you find it hard to chip in.

t_ch: （他们聊得好激烈啊…还是先去回复消息吧。）
t_en: (Wow, the discussion is intense... Let me reply to the message first.)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你回来了。我刚才和「四大善人」商讨了一下，究竟该给咱们一个什么样的「入会试炼」……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're back. I just discussed with the Four Benevolent Ones about the newcomer trial...

t_ch: 现在是「三大善人」！我们一致认为，应当让你替咱们解决眼下的难题。
t_en: It's Three Benevolent Ones now! Well, we've agreed that we should let you solve the problem at hand for us.

t_ch: 您想必也看出来了…我们三人放生的生命构成了一条食物链，希斯曼的植物被我的法乌努斯红毛羊吃掉，而我的小羊又被冬妮娅的猛兽吃掉……
t_en: I believe you can tell that the creatures we released have formed a food chain. Heathmann's plants were eaten by my Faunus Red Sheep, and my sheep were eaten by Tonya's beasts...

t_ch: 再这么下去，我们还积攒什么功德啊！全都内耗掉了！
t_en: If this goes on, all the merits we have accumulated will be in vain!

t_ch: 植物，无法反抗…总是最大的输家！
t_en: Plants can't fight. This makes them the biggest loser!

t_ch: 我就不用担心，我永远不会卷入你们这些蠢事。咱们「微观派」的优越感正是由此而来。
t_en: I don't have to worry as I'll never have such concerns. That's why our Microscopic Faction is better than everyone else.

t_ch: 「糊弄派」的，你再多说一句我就抽你。
t_en: One more word from you, "Fooling Around Faction," and I'll smack you.

t_ch: 好啦好啦，你们不要再打起来了。总而言之，给我们师徒二人的入会试炼已经敲定了——想办法解决「三大善人」之间的「食物链难题」。
t_en: Okay, okay. Please don't start another fight. Anyway, the newcomer trial for us two, as the master and a student, has been decided: We have to solve the food chain problem among the Three Benevolent Ones.

t_ch: 正是如此。
t_en: Indeed.

t_ch: 不放生，就没有这烦恼喽？
t_en: You won't have this problem if you all stop the act of releasing wildlife.

t_ch: 咱们什么时候是师徒了？
t_en: When did I become your student?

t_ch: 找到我们三人都能满意的解决方案，就是本次试炼的核心。
t_en: Finding the solution that meets the needs of all three of us is the core of this trial.

t_ch: 嗯…这个入会试炼还蛮有趣的。几位先忙，我们两个单独讨论一下…{NICKNAME}，借一步说话。
t_en: Hmm... this newcomer trial is quite interesting. Please allow us two to discuss it in private... {NICKNAME}, follow me.

t_ch: 这三个人放生的小生命构成了食物链，相互猎杀，对他们之间的友谊和信仰造成了致命打击……
t_en: The living creatures released by this trio formed a food chain and consumed each other. This has dealt a devastating blow to their friendship and beliefs...

t_ch: 可是怎么才能保证他们放生的东西，不会构成食物链呢？
t_en: But how can we guarantee the living creatures they release won't form a food chain?

t_ch: 让他们换个世界放生？
t_en: Get them to release in different worlds?

t_ch: 你是说，让他们去不同的地方放生？这些商旅在罗浮上各有事业，他们怎么肯呢？
t_en: You mean we should ask them to release the living creatures in different places? These traveling merchants have to look after their businesses on the Luofu. They wouldn't be willing to do that.

t_ch: 对了，我有个办法。你看，他们仨各自热爱的放生目标会构成食物链，但是同一种动物总不至于自己捕猎自己吧。
t_en: I have an idea. Look, the living creatures these three love to release can form a food chain, but the same species won't hunt their own kind, right?

t_ch: 那大家只放生同一种生命呢？
t_en: How about we let them release the same species of creature?

t_ch: 哎呀！这想法真不错！三种不同的生物会构成食物链，但是同一种动物总不至于自己捕猎自己吧！
t_en: That is a brilliant idea! Three species can form a food chain, but the same species won't hunt their own kind, right?

t_ch: 这样吧，咱们就从这三人的放生对象中寻找共性？这世上肯定有生命，可以同时符合他们所有人的需求……
t_en: Let's find out the similarities among the creatures they like to release. There must be a kind of being in this world that can meet the needs of all of them...

t_ch: 这怎么可能！背弃「丰饶」之道，岂不就是把自己开除出生命的队伍？
t_en: This is out of the question! Abandoning the way of Abundance will oust me from the team of life!

t_ch: 要是哪天咱们遇到了危险，我想高呼慈悲的药师搭救时，我不想自己的功德户头里空荡荡的，一点儿让自己自豪的善举都没有。
t_en: If I were in danger one day and needed Yaoshi's help, I wouldn't want my merit account to be empty without a single kind deed that I could take pride in.

t_ch: 不行，放生帮的事业，是光荣的事业，是脱离了低级趣味的事业。
t_en: No way. Being a part of the Unshackled is glorious and meaningful.

t_ch: 唉，培养「放生帮」后进，在通过试炼的道路上给予帮助也是我的职责啊。所以从某种意义上来说，我们当然算是师徒。
t_en: Well, it's my duty to train the newcomers of the Unshackled and help them pass the trial. In a sense, that makes you my student.

t_ch: 不过这「三大善人」脾气都很倔，认定了自己的道路，轻易是不会改变的。
t_en: But the Three Benevolent Ones are very stubborn. Once they have decided to do something, hardly anything can change their minds.

t_ch: 找我？
t_en: Looking for me?

t_ch: 「草叶派」的放生标准…
t_en: What are the criteria for a species that can be released by the Plant Faction...?

t_ch: 光合作用、好养活、无排泄物…那便是完美的放生对象，「植物」。
t_en: Capable of photosynthesis, easy to cultivate, and has no excretion... that would be a "plant," the perfect creature to be released.

t_ch: 这个试炼若能通过，足以证明你潜力非凡。
t_en: If you can pass this trial, it shows that you have great potential.

t_ch: 「野兽派」的放生标准…
t_en: What are the criteria for a species that can be released by the Beast Faction...?

t_ch: 依我说，整个「放生帮」应该去放生那些充满力量的野兽，让他们脱离人类的掌控！不要猎鹰和斗犬，要让它们在自然中展现生命力！
t_en: If you ask me, I think everyone from the Unshackled should endeavor to free powerful beasts from human captivity! No more hunting falcons or fighting dogs! Let them unleash their vitality in nature!

t_ch: 毕竟，让生命在适合它们的猎场中自由狩猎，这才符合自然法则啊，也符合仙舟的「巡猎」之道不是吗？
t_en: After all, isn't it in line with the laws of nature and the way of The Hunt on the Xianzhou to allow living creatures to hunt freely in an environment suitable for them?

t_ch: 什么事，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: What's the matter, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 「保育派」的放生标准…
t_en: What are the criteria for a species that can be released by the Nurture Faction...?

t_ch: 我们保育派的主张特别简单，我们用放生的方式来拯救和保护那些被过度捕猎，数量稀少不足以延续种群的濒危物种。
t_en: Our position is pretty straightforward — We aim to rescue and protect endangered species that are so overhunted and scarce that they can hardly sustain their population.

t_ch: 唉…原本放生法乌努斯红毛羊也是这个意图，谁曾想，这种羊就这样在鳞渊境灭绝了！
t_en: Alas... it was for this reason that I released the Faunus Red Sheep into Scalegorge Waterscape. Little did I know that I was sending them to their demise!

t_ch: 嗯？找我有什么事吗？
t_en: Oh? Anything I can help you with?

t_ch: 你对入会试炼有什么建议吗？
t_en: Do you have any suggestions for the newcomer trial?

t_ch: 别问我…我就是一「矿泉水人」，和那三位放生大师的食物链没啥关系。
t_en: Don't ask me... I'm just a "mineral water guy" — I don't have anything to do with the food chain of those three great ones.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，咱们总结一下吧…看看能不能从这几个人的要求中找到共性……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let's compile a summary and see whether there are similarities among these three...

t_ch: 首先是是冬妮娅，她想要让强而有力的猛兽摆脱人类的控制。
t_en: Firstly, there's Tonya. She wants to free powerful beasts from human control.

t_ch: 换言之，咱们需要找到一个濒危且凶猛的…植物？这还真是一道难题啊…你有什么头绪吗？
t_en: In other words, we need to find an endangered and ferocious... plant? This is so challenging... Do you have any ideas?

t_ch: 食人花？
t_en: A man-eating plant?

t_ch: 你是说食肉植物？那倒确实是「凶猛的植物」，但大部分都不怎么濒危呀。如果你去过翁瓦克就会知道，那儿的肉食性王冠花到处都是。
t_en: Do you mean a carnivorous plant? That's indeed a ferocious plant, but I don't think they are endangered species. If you've been to Vonwacq, you'll know it's full of carnivorous crown flowers.

t_ch: 至于仙舟上，最近的确出现了一些凶狠可怕、浑身长满叶子的蔬菜人！但那些东西是人还是植物很难说，也不会有人想要控制它们……
t_en: Lately there have been sightings of scary "leaf walkers" on the Xianzhou — creatures with foliage growing all over their body! It's hard to say whether those things are human or plant, but I don't think anyone would want to keep them in captivity...

t_ch: 那么，无机生命？
t_en: How about inorganic beings?

t_ch: 机械生物？机巧鸟和谛听那种吗？
t_en: Do you mean mechanical creatures like cycranes and Ditings?

t_ch: 我想想…嘿！你还别说，虽然你这个想法乍一听很离谱，但仔细一想…更离谱！
t_en: Hmm... Your idea sounded outrageous at first, but now that I think about it... it sounds even more outrageous!

t_ch: 仙舟的机巧到底哪儿凶猛了？满大街飞来飞去的机巧鸟到底哪里濒危了！
t_en: What's ferocious about cycranes? Besides, people see them flying by all the time — they couldn't be endangered!

t_ch: 我去过一个灭亡边缘的世界…
t_en: I've been to a world that is on the brink of destruction...

t_ch: 你说的…该不会是最近才重回公司贸易体的那个…雅…雅萝莉八号？
t_en: Are you talking about the one that has returned to the IPC's economical sphere recently? Ya... Yaloli-8?

t_ch: 有座末日孤城叫贝洛伯格！
t_en: There's an isolated doomsday city called Belobog!

t_ch: 贝洛伯格？我好像听说过这么个地方！该不会就在最近重回公司贸易体的那个星球…雅…雅萝莉？
t_en: Belobog? I think I've heard of it before! Are you talking about the planet that has returned to the IPC's economical sphere recently? Ya... Yaloli-8?

t_ch: 哈，妙啊。听说那颗星球因为大灾难而就此断绝音信了。
t_en: How intriguing. It is said that the planet was never heard from again after it was struck by a large-scale disaster.

t_ch: 如果是这种地方存在机械生物，多半会有技术衰退的困扰。这样的无机生物确实算得上是「凶猛且濒危」了！
t_en: If mechanical lifeforms were present on such locations, most of them will be troubled with technological regression. In that scenario, they can be counted as ferocious and endangered!

t_ch: 「植物」的定义很自由…
t_en: The word "plant" has a broad definition...

t_ch: 嗯…我懂你的心意了！我们可以在「植物」的定义上大做文章啊！没问题，机械生物绝对没问题！
t_en: Hmm... I know where you're going with this! We can use a broad definition of plants to include mechanical creatures!

t_ch: 既然你提出了这个方案，想必也知道该去哪儿搞一台…不，是一头贝洛伯格的珍稀机械生物吧？
t_en: Since you proposed this idea, you must know where a rare rob— no, a rare mechanical creature — from Belobog can be acquired, right?

t_ch: （购买贝洛伯格的机械生物啊…该去问谁呢？先问问希露瓦吧，她毕竟是开机械屋的。）
t_en: (Who should I turn to if I wanna purchase Belobogian mechanical creatures? Serval, maybe. After all, she owns a workshop.)

t_ch: 接下来，贝娜，她希望解救无法繁衍的濒危物种。
t_en: Next, it's Benna. Her goal is to rescue endangered species that are unable to reproduce.

t_ch: 最后是希斯曼，他的标准最简单也最麻烦，他只对植物感兴趣。
t_en: Lastly, it's Heathmann. His criteria are the simplest yet most demanding, as he's only interested in plants.

t_ch: 当然了，如果有某个地方的无机生命，因为某种原因很难继续生产和维修了，这样也许能符合条件，不过我没听过这样的地方？
t_en: If there exists a mechanical lifeform species that is unable to be repaired or manufactured for some reason, it might fit the criteria. However, I've never heard of such a place.

t_ch: 你这个想法非常好啊，不过还有一个小问题——这玩意儿不是植物啊！
t_en: Your idea is promising, but there's a problem — this thing isn't a plant!

t_ch: 唉？需要咱们把废弃品翻修一新吗？
t_en: Oh? Do we have to refurbish discarded products?

t_ch: 既然这是咱们一起协商得出的结论，那咱们就一起奔波这么一回吧。
t_en: Since this is a decision we made together, let's do our best to make it work.

t_ch: 走吧，出发去贝洛伯格！
t_en: Let's set off to Belobog!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！好久不见咯～你旁边这位女士是？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, it's been a while! Who's this lady next to you?

t_ch: 你好，我叫钟珊，是帮助{NICKNAME}采购这批机械生命的战略合作伙伴。
t_en: Hello, my name is Zhongshan. I'm {NICKNAME}'s strategic partner in the purchase of mechanical lifeforms.

t_ch: 「机械生命」？「战略合作伙伴」？哈哈哈，你这人用词真有意思。
t_en: Mechanical lifeforms? Strategic partner? Hahaha, interesting choice of words.

t_ch: 在带走这些废铁前，我必须提个问题，就当是提前支付的报酬好了——你们为什么会对贝洛伯格的科技感兴趣？
t_en: Before taking these scrap metals with you, I must ask you a question, and I'll take your answer as the advanced payment. Why are you two interested in the technology of Belobog?

t_ch: 你向希露瓦讲述了自己加入「放生帮」的来龙去脉。
t_en: You tell Serval the whys and wherefores of how you joined the Unshackled.

t_ch: 将贝洛伯格的机器当作濒危生命，「放生」到遥远的世界里，积累所谓的「功德」…？
t_en: Treat the machines in Belobog as endangered creatures and release them to a faraway world in order to "accumulate merits"?

t_ch: …哈哈哈哈，在贝洛伯格与世隔绝了太久，一时间我很难接受这么新奇的思潮冲击啊。
t_en: ...Hahahaha! Being isolated in Belobog for so long, it's hard for me to accept such a novel idea.

t_ch: 是指「放生机器」…？
t_en: Do you mean the idea of releasing machines...?

t_ch: 还是「积累功德」…？
t_en: Do you mean the idea of accumulating merits...?

t_ch: 机器算不算生命，或者说生命算不算一种机器，这都是因人而异的定义罢了。放生嘛…如果是为了保护某些动物不受伤害，我也能理解。
t_en: Everyone defines machines and living things differently. About releasing the machines... If it's to protect certain animals from being harmed, then I can understand.

t_ch: 但想通过这样的行为取悦星神，累积功德…真是很有自信的想法呢。人类的行为对星神很重要么？
t_en: However, the idea of pleasing the Aeon through such actions is quite bold. Does it matter to Aeons how humans behave?

t_ch: 或者说，真的有一双眼睛在天上时刻审视着咱们每个人的道德行为？在你伤害一个生命时，给你扣个几十分，在你拯救了某人的性命时给你加、加、加个一百分？
t_en: Is there someone up there who constantly reviews the morality of our actions? Will we get our points deducted when we hurt a living thing and gain points when we rescue one?

t_ch: 觉得「自己的所作所为很重要」，那恐怕只是身为人类独有的傲慢罢了。
t_en: I'm afraid it's a sign of arrogance for humans to think that their actions are that important.

t_ch: 我同意。
t_en: I agree.

t_ch: 插个嘴，我也这么看。
t_en: That's what I think too.

t_ch: 也许药师真的在意…
t_en: Perhaps Yaoshi really does care about what humans do...

t_ch: 是啊，可不要排除那些对人类特别感兴趣的星神。
t_en: Exactly. Don't forget about those Aeons who are particularly interested in humans.

t_ch: 这里不就被琥珀王看护着吗？
t_en: Isn't this place protected by the Amber Lord?

t_ch: 这座城市能从寒潮里幸存下来，我认为只是筑城者的遗民善用了祖先留下的科技罢了。
t_en: In my opinion, this city was able to survive the Eternal Freeze only because the remnants of the Architects made good use of the technology left behind by their ancestors.

t_ch: 当然了，「克里珀看顾我们」之类的说法…用在教材和演讲稿上鼓舞鼓舞人心还是不错的选择。
t_en: Of course, using phrases like "we have the blessing of Qlipoth" in teaching materials and speeches is a good way to inspire everyone.

t_ch: 好了，一介小小机械师的牢骚，想必不能改变「放生帮」的心意。
t_en: Anyways. I don't expect the opinion of a mere mechanic like me to hold sway over the Unshackled.

t_ch: 不过，既然把这些机器当成生命，各位少不得亲手救治一下他们，让他们「起死回生」。
t_en: Since you regard these machines as living things, you need to at least administer treatment and bring them back to life.

t_ch: 情况比我想象中好一些……这些机兵的技术很古旧，抱歉，希露瓦小姐，我的意思是，古典。
t_en: Things are slightly better than I thought... The technology used in these automatons is archaic... Oh, sorry Miss Serval, I mean to say that it is vintage.

t_ch: 身为主治医师，光有我一个人可不成。
t_en: As the presiding physician, I can't do all the work by myself.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我需要你的配合，看到我带来了这些超控模块吗？想办法拆开机兵的外壳，找到适配的接口，把它们都接上去试试。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I require your assistance. See those override modules I brought? Try to remove the casing of the automatons and search for the right port to connect with the modules.

t_ch: 钟珊蹲下身，检查了一下几台机兵的状况。
t_en: Zhongshan crouches down to examine the automatons.

t_ch: 坏的很彻底啊，不过如果能替换几个关键零件，也许还有救…
t_en: These automatons are defunct to the core. However, they might be salvageable if some of their key parts can be replaced.

t_ch: 观察你们两位的手艺，真是让我学到了不少。
t_en: I'm learning a lot by observing you two at work.

t_ch: 我看看，应该怎么连接计算中枢呢…算啦，接上我带来的这些超控装置吧？
t_en: Let me see... How should I connect to the central processor? Forget it. I'll just connect them directly to the override modules.

t_ch: （呼…总算搞定了。修好一台机器可比用球棒砸碎它麻烦多了。）
t_en: (Phew... It's finally done. Repairing a machine is way more troublesome than smashing it with a baseball bat.)

t_ch: 唔，引擎还在转动，这一台的状态似乎还不错嘛？
t_en: Oh, the engine is still running. This machine seems to be in pretty good condition.

t_ch: （这台机兵似乎又被点亮了…这算是回光返照还是尸骨未寒？）
t_en: (The lights on this automaton seem to be coming on... is it hanging on to dear life, or is it the last flicker of a dead machine?)

t_ch: 接入机兵。
t_en: Connect to the automatons.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，当心，听这家伙的响动，似乎不太对劲！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, careful! You hear that sound? There seems to be something wrong!

t_ch: 先放一边…
t_en: Let's put it aside first...

t_ch: …模式…启动…灭杀…
t_en: ...Mode activated... Kill...

t_ch: 呜呼，真不愧是劫后余生的世界啊，每一台机兵都是奔着战斗去。
t_en: Wow, this is indeed a world that has survived a catastrophe. Every automaton is ready for battle.

t_ch: 幸好{NICKNAME}和你都没事。
t_en: Thank goodness {NICKNAME} and you are okay.

t_ch: 伤了我，放生帮得赔到破产…
t_en: If I'm injured, the Unshackled will have to bankrupt themselves to compensate me.

t_ch: 唔，索赔对象可千万别把我算进去。
t_en: Um, please don't count me in when you ask for compensation.

t_ch: 区区机兵…我可砸趴下不少。
t_en: These automatons are nothing. I've destroyed many of them before.

t_ch: 哼哼，就当是这些大家伙不能瞑目，来找你复仇好了。
t_en: Hehe, just assume these big guys can't rest in peace and have come to take revenge on you.

t_ch: 不过既然{NICKNAME}已经饱以老拳，让它见识到厉害了，那么修好…不，治好它的工作就交给我吧。
t_en: Since {NICKNAME} has shown those automatons who's the boss here with their fist, I shall take on the duty of fixing... no, curing them.

t_ch: 你那边都搞定了？我这里也差不多了。
t_en: How's the work on your side? My job here is almost done.

t_ch: 这些机兵会不会太危险了…
t_en: These automatons won't pose a threat, will they...?

t_ch: 放心好了，刚才都是意外状况。我已经调试好了这几台机兵的程序，现在它们只会按照我设定好的模式行动。
t_en: Don't worry. What happened earlier was just an accident. I've debugged their programming, so now these automatons will only act according to the mode I've set.

t_ch: 他们能接受放生机兵吗…
t_en: Will they be able to accept the idea of releasing automatons?

t_ch: 他们能不能接受…就看咱们俩的三寸不烂之舌咯。
t_en: Well, it depends on how we convince them.

t_ch: 接下来，咱们分头行动吧。这么多机兵，全都装到星穹列车上，你们家那个列车长非急眼不可。
t_en: Now, let's split up. I'm sure the Astral Express conductor will freak out if we load so many automatons on the train all at once.

t_ch: 我雇了公司的运输船，带着机兵回罗浮。你嘛，就坐着你的星穹列车，慢慢来吧。
t_en: So, I've rented a transport ship from the IPC to bring the automatons back to the Luofu. You can take the Astral Express back — no need to rush.

t_ch: 那么，希露瓦小姐，感谢您的慷慨相助。我和{NICKNAME}准备动身返回罗浮了，咱们可不能让那三位功德大师等太久。
t_en: Miss Serval, thanks for your generous help. {NICKNAME} and I will be heading back to the Luofu. We can't afford to make the Grandmasters Meritus wait too long.

t_ch: 好啊。虽然眼下来贝洛伯格的商船渐渐多了起来，但毕竟这儿还是真正意义上的「穷乡僻壤」。希望两位往后也能常来这儿转转。
t_en: Sure. Although there have been more merchant ships in Belobog recently, this city is still rather quiet and desolate. Please drop by whenever you have the chance.

t_ch: 那么就此别过了。
t_en: Goodbye.

t_ch: 放心好了，咱们师徒二人替他们选择的这个解决方案，绝对能让他们满意。
t_en: Don't worry. I believe they will be satisfied with our solution.

t_ch: 我已经向放生帮的几位大善人发出了邀请。
t_en: I've sent out invitations to the Benevolent Ones.

t_ch: 大家约定在鳞渊境这片生机盎然的乐土里见证你完成入会试炼。
t_en: We've agreed to witness the completion of your newcomer trial on the thriving land of Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 记得准时到哟~
t_en: Remember to be there on time.

t_ch: 怎么样，你现在就回去吗？还是说你要先去和老朋友们叙叙旧？我是打算去见一位旧友，现在还不急着走。
t_en: Are you heading back right away or staying to catch up with your old friends? I'm going to meet a friend of mine first, so there's no need to rush.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're here.

t_ch: 我已经向他们展示了咱们打算放生的对象，不过大善人们似乎不太满意。
t_en: I've presented our plan to the Benevolent Ones, but they don't seem too pleased about it.

t_ch: 走吧，该是凭口才说服他们的时候了，咱们挨个找他们聊聊…就像开始时那样。
t_en: It's time to convince them with our silver tongues. Let's chat with them one by one... just like what we did in the beginning.

t_ch: 机械生物到处都是啊，仙舟满天飞的都是些机巧鸟。您上次来不还带了一条谛听？这怎么算得上是濒危生物呢？
t_en: Mechanical creatures are everywhere, and the sky is full of those cycranes. Didn't you bring a Diting with you the last time you were here? In what sense are they endangered species?

t_ch: 况且，「入会试炼」的题目是，让您们想办法解决我们三人的食物链难题…这机械生物又怎么能解决我们的问题呢？
t_en: Besides, you two are required to solve the food chain issue among us to pass the newcomer trial... How can these mechanical creatures solve that problem?

t_ch: 这你就有所不知了…这些弱小、可怜、无助的无机宝宝们都来自一颗濒临毁灭的星球，它的名字叫，呃…雅萝莉八号！
t_en: Well, you don't know everything about these creatures. These weak and helpless mechanical creatures come from a planet verging on destruction named, um, Yaloli-8!

t_ch: 那里已经无法再生产…
t_en: The place is no longer capable of manufacturing...

t_ch: 噢，听起来真是让人心碎。所以…这是一个衰退文明遗留下的最后一批机械生命？
t_en: Oh, it breaks my heart to hear this. So... is this the last batch of mechanical lifeforms left behind by a declining civilization?

t_ch: 正是！堪称濒危中的濒危啊！不可再生，我们费尽力气才将它们修好…我是说，治好他们的致命伤势。这些小家伙还为了保护自己的人类主人勇敢地参战呢。
t_en: Exactly! They are an out-and-out endangered species! As new machines couldn't be made, we went all out to fix, I mean, to treat their lethal wounds. These little guys even fought valiantly to protect their human masters.

t_ch: 放生它们，将它们从那绝境和必死的命运里解放出来的您，贝娜小姐，将会攒下大大的功德！
t_en: Miss Benna, you'll gain a lot of merits by releasing them and freeing them from the crisis and their imminent demise!

t_ch: 我、我明白了。我认可，这确实是一批值得放生的小宝贝。
t_en: I—I've got it. Indeed, these helpless babies are really worth releasing.

t_ch: 我还以为你找到了什么合适的放生对象哩！
t_en: This isn't what I expected from you!

t_ch: 贝娜小姐和公司贸易代表关系不错，一定听过这个世界的名字。听说它最近才刚刚重回贸易联合体的怀抱。
t_en: Miss Benna, I believe you must have heard of this planet before, since you're close with the trade reps of the IPC. I heard that the planet has just resumed its trade lately.

t_ch: …这样的机器宝宝了！
t_en: ...mechanical babies like these!

t_ch: 哎呀，这些濒危宝宝，我还真是越看越喜欢……
t_en: Oh, the more I look at these endangered darlings, the more fond I grow of them...

t_ch: 机械…生物。这确实是个从未思考的角度。不过，创造它们的技术太弱后了！
t_en: Mechanical... creatures. That's a whole new way to look at this matter. Still, I must say the technology used to manufacture them is too outdated!

t_ch: 我说过的吧，「放生帮」应该去放生充满力量的野兽，让他们脱离人类的掌控！不要猎鹰和斗犬，让它们在自然中展现生命力！
t_en: I think I said before that the Unshackled should endeavor to free powerful beasts from human captivity! We must stop hunting for falcons and holding dog fights! Let them unleash their vitality in nature!

t_ch: 唉…看来不让你见识一下，你是不会相信了。机兵，立刻攻击{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Alas... I guess we have to show you some proof for you to believe us. Automatons, attack {NICKNAME} now!

t_ch: 听好了，这可是让冬妮娅小姐见识一下这些强而有力的机械生命的好机会。
t_en: Listen, now is the perfect time to show Miss Tonya how powerful these mechanical lifeforms are.

t_ch: 打她啊，打我干嘛？
t_en: Why don't you let the automatons attack her instead?

t_ch: 笨蛋，冬妮娅小姐可是放生帮的大善人！福报等身，岂能遭遇这样的飞来横祸？
t_en: Are you in your right mind? Miss Tonya is a Benevolent One of the Unshackled! How can we make her suffer when she has accumulated so many merits?

t_ch: 这些原始的机械生物，贫弱、孱弱、苦弱！走起路来每一个制动关节都在颤抖，外壳上的每一颗固定螺栓都要蹦出来了
t_en: These primitive mechanical creatures are poor, weak, and sickly! Every joint of theirs trembles and the bolts on their casings threaten to pop out as they move.

t_ch: 我就该被暴打一顿吗？
t_en: Do I deserve to be beaten up?

t_ch: 你可真能挑事啊你。
t_en: You really know how to pick a fight, don't you?

t_ch: 这…真是一场精彩的对决啊！
t_en: What a great duel this is!

t_ch: 那是当然了，这些出自雅萝莉八号星上的奇妙机械生物被它们无情的人类主人奴役着奔向战场，牺牲、破碎、熄灭，代替所有的人类。
t_en: Of course! These wonderful mechanical creatures from Yaloli-8 are enslaved and sent to the battlefield by their ruthless human masters. They sacrifice themselves and bear all the damage in the humans' stead.

t_ch: 放生它们，将它们从那无情的人类主子手里解放出来的您，冬妮娅小姐，将会攒下大大的功德！
t_en: Miss Tonya, you'll gain a lot of merits by releasing them and freeing them from their heartless human masters!

t_ch: 我明白了，我没问题了！
t_en: I understand! I have no more questions!

t_ch: 强而有力！强而有力！那些乍一看颇为原始的机械结构，仔细一看，才发现都是独属于野兽的粗犷壮美！
t_en: Powerful and ferocious! After taking a closer look at the structure of these primitive machines, I can see the rugged beauty of beasts in them!

t_ch: 希斯曼，你看起来不是很满意呀？
t_en: Heathmann, you don't seem too happy about this.

t_ch: 道理，我都懂。但…你管这玩意儿叫…植物？
t_en: I can understand the theoreticals, but... are you sure this kind of thing is a plant?

t_ch: 「光合作用、好养活、无排泄物…」你的原话是这么说来着的吧。你瞧瞧，这是什么。
t_en: "Capable of photosynthesis, easy to cultivate, and has no excretion... Plants are the perfect living creature to be released." You said that, didn't you? Watch this.

t_ch: 钟珊打开机兵的后盖，露出了那块你亲手安装上去的超控模块。
t_en: Zhongshan opens the cover at the back of an automaton, revealing the override module you installed.

t_ch: 这是…咳，应该是某种控制这台机器的装置吧？我不懂，这和我的定义什么关系？
t_en: This is, ahem, a certain device that controls this machine, isn't it? I don't understand how it is related to my definition of plants.

t_ch: 让我来告诉你，这是由折叠太阳能板供电的超控模块。你眼前的这只机械生命，靠太阳能，也就是「光合作用」来活动——就像你最喜欢的植物那样。
t_en: Well, it's an override module powered by a folded solar panel. This mechanical lifeform before you relies on solar energy, which is photosynthesis, to move around - just like the plants you love.

t_ch: 好养活…
t_en: It's easy to cultivate...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}提醒了我，只要让这家伙在能量耗尽后进入节能停滞，打开太阳能板晒上几天就行了。
t_en: Thanks for the reminder, {NICKNAME}. When this individual runs out of energy, just let it enter the energy-saving mode and expose the solar panel to sunlight for a few days.

t_ch: 无排泄物…
t_en: It has no excretion...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}提醒了我。这小家伙绝对不会产生任何不体面的代谢产物，纯天然无公害。
t_en: Thanks for the reminder, {NICKNAME}. This little one will never produce any unpleasant waste. It is purely natural and harmless.

t_ch: 希斯曼焦虑地擦了擦脑门上的汗。
t_en: Heathmann wipes away the sweat on his forehead, looking distressed.

t_ch: 所以，它是植物？无法接受…这不是植物。绝对，不是！至少它得长得像一株植物吧！
t_en: So, it's a plant? This is unacceptable... It can't be a plant. Absolutely not! It has to at least look like one!

t_ch: 所以，植物得长成什么样子？得有粗大的树干？还是绚丽的花瓣？或是埋在地下的块茎？
t_en: What does a plant look like? Must it have a huge trunk? Must it come with beautiful flowers? Or must it have a tuber buried in the ground?

t_ch: 要不您老画下个道儿来，也方便我给您身后这家伙捯饬捯饬？
t_en: Could you draw me a picture of a plant so that I can fix the appearance of this lifeform behind you?

t_ch: 我…呃，你好像…说的也对……
t_en: I... um... think you've got a point...

t_ch: 那我们的「入会试炼」算是……
t_en: So, how did we do in this newcomer trial...

t_ch: 通过！我没问题了。
t_en: It's a pass! I'm fine with this.

t_ch: 机械是植物…植物是机械…嗯？有点怪…算了……
t_en: Machines are plants... Plants are machines... Eh? It sounds a bit off... Forget it...

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，他们信了，他们真的信了。哎呀不行了，笑得我肚子疼。
t_en: Hahahaha, they bought it! They really bought it! Oh no, I'm about to die laughing!

t_ch: 你笑什么？
t_en: What are you laughing at?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈，这不好笑吗？
t_en: Hahahaha, isn't this hilarious?

t_ch: 他们之间有那么大的分歧，现在却同意放生同一种生物，这种和谐的大团圆结局，难道不值得我们笑一笑吗？
t_en: They have worked out their differences and agreed to release the same living thing! Isn't this kind of happy ending worth our laughter?

t_ch: 唉…笑得差不多了，走吧，咱们去水边吧。刚才和他们三位功德大师约好了，咱们要在这里搞一个小规模放生仪式。
t_en: Okay, that's enough laughter for today. Let's go to the waterfront. The three Grandmasters Meritus and I have just decided to hold a small release ritual there.

t_ch: 这三个人之间的食物链问题解决了，以后再也不会被别人败坏掉功德了，确实是可喜可贺的事情…药师若是有知，想必会与我们同喜。
t_en: Now that the Three Benevolent One's food chain problem is solved, their merits won't be undermined by others in the future. This is indeed something worth celebrating... If Yaoshi knows about this, I'm sure they will share our joy.

t_ch: 走咯，攒功德去咯～
t_en: Let's go and get some merits!

t_ch: 这些可爱的小生灵，即将承载着诸位的功德，走向更广阔的新世界了，大家都说两句送给它们的寄语吧！
t_en: These lovely little creatures will carry your merits and depart to a bigger new world. Let's give them our blessings!

t_ch: 秉承自信而活吧，我的小可爱们。药王慈怀，定会照亮你们前方的道路。
t_en: Always be confident, my little darlings. The gracious Sanctus Medicus will surely illuminate your path ahead.

t_ch: 像猛兽一样露出獠牙吧！我的战士们！你们充满活力的战斗之姿，正是药师大人的神力昭彰！
t_en: Show your ferocious side like the beasts, my warriors! Your valor is the manifestation of the divine power of Yaoshi!

t_ch: 去吧…茂盛生长吧，呃，小铁花们……
t_en: Go ahead and thrive, um, my little blossoms of steel...

t_ch: 喂喂喂，你们在干什么呢？别往水里倾倒电子垃圾好吗？你知道这水里有多少无辜的微生物吗？
t_en: Hey, hey, what are you guys doing? Can you please stop dumping electronic waste into the water? Do you know how many innocent microbes are living in it?

t_ch: 给我看点气氛！矿泉水人！
t_en: Read the room, mineral water guy!

t_ch: （他们似乎沉浸在自我感动的氛围中…还是不要打扰他们了。）
t_en: (They seem to be deeply moved by their own actions... I'd better not disturb them.)

t_ch: （我总觉得这件事有哪儿不太对劲。）
t_en: (I have a feeling something's amiss about all this.)

t_ch: 你疑惑地返回长乐天，消磨了几个小时。
t_en: Feeling dubious, you return to the Exalting Sanctum and idle away for several hours.

t_ch: （他们似乎沉浸在自我感动的氛围中…还是不要打扰他们了。）
t_en: (They seem to be deeply moved by their own actions... I'd better not disturb them.)

t_ch: 关于「放生帮」…
t_en: About the Unshackled...

t_ch: 「放生帮」？哦，您是来谈那件事啊。怎么样？您顺利加入「放生帮」了吗？
t_en: The Unshackled? Oh, you're here to talk about that. How did it go? Have you joined them?

t_ch: 相当顺利…
t_en: It went without a hitch...

t_ch: 那太好了…如果他们打算进行任何有危害性的活动，请您立刻通知我们。
t_en: That's great... If they intend to carry out any hazardous activities, please inform us immediately.

t_ch: 当然，更好的结局是…您再次发挥了您的特长，将这个危险的组织给瓦解掉了。
t_en: Of course, it'd be better if you could use your expertise to dismantle this dangerous organization.

t_ch: 我什么时候有得这种特长…
t_en: Since when did I have such expertise?

t_ch: 您就别谦虚了，现在整个地衡司都等着您的好消息呢。
t_en: Don't be modest. Everyone from the Realm-Keeping Commission is waiting to hear about your success.

t_ch: 我一定不辱使命。
t_en: I won't let you down.

t_ch: 您办事我们一向是放心的。现在整个地衡司都等着您的好消息呢。
t_en: We've always had confidence in you. Everyone from the Realm-Keeping Commission is waiting to hear about your success.

t_ch: 你出现了啊，{NICKNAME}…真是要感谢你们师徒俩出的主意，
t_en: You're here, {NICKNAME}... You should be ashamed. Thanks to your *great idea*...

t_ch: 这下可好，冬妮娅他们都摊上了麻烦事儿。
t_en: Tonya and the rest are in trouble.

t_ch: 什么话，我们师徒二人只是在他们的要求下，帮助了他们，仅此而已。
t_en: What are you talking about? We just offered them help at their request. That's all.

t_ch: 好个帮助，这三位眼下在长乐天吵起来了，你们自己去问问情况吧。
t_en: You call that "help"!? Now the three are bickering in the Exalting Sanctum. Check out the situation yourselves.

t_ch: 嘿，这下可有意思了。这「三大善人」现在都在长乐天？咱们赶紧去问问吧，看看他们倒了什么大霉。
t_en: Hee-hee, things are getting interesting. Are the Three Benevolent Ones in the Exalting Sanctum now? Let's find out what kind of trouble they're having.

t_ch: 你怎么看着这么开心？
t_en: How come you look so happy?

t_ch: 我哪有开心啊！我只是嘴角有些抽搐罢了。
t_en: Not at all! It's just that the corner of my mouth is twitching.

t_ch: 确实很令人在意…
t_en: This is really concerning...

t_ch: 那咱们快找找他们吧。
t_en: Let's hurry up and find them.

t_ch: （期待地搓手）
t_en: (Rubbing your hands in anticipation)

t_ch: 你那么兴奋干什么，大霉了！要严肃一点，严肃！
t_en: Why do you look so excited? Big trouble is looming ahead! Be serious!

t_ch: 怎么样啊，贝娜？放生机械生物以后，功德积攒还顺利吗？
t_en: What's up, Benna? Did you increase your merits after releasing the mechanical creatures?

t_ch: 顺利个屁！我都快哭背过气去了……
t_en: Don't even mention it! I've cried so much that I can't even breathe...

t_ch: 哎哟哟，这可不好，是出什么事了吗？
t_en: Sounds awful. What happened?

t_ch: 咱们放生的那几个机械宝宝，怎么会自爆啊？
t_en: Why did the mechanical darlings we released blow themselves up?

t_ch: 哎呀，你没受伤吧。
t_en: What!? You weren't injured, were you?

t_ch: 我倒是没受伤，但那几个机械宝宝走进水后，在鳞渊境到处开花…持明的人把我扭送到地衡司公廨，说我…在持明族圣地乱放烟花爆竹！
t_en: I'm fine. But the mechanical darlings started blowing up everywhere in Scalegorge Waterscape once water seeped into the machinery... The Vidyadhara dragged me to the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery... and accused me of setting off fireworks illegally in the holy place of the Vidyadhara!

t_ch: 天啊，我以前也不知道冒犯圣地是这么大的罪过…赔了好多钱啊，好多钱…我把自己的棺材本都赔进去了！
t_en: I had no idea that disrespecting a holy place was such a grave offense... The fine was exorbitant! I've used up all my retirement funds!

t_ch: 真抱歉，是我们的提议…
t_en: I'm sorry. It was our suggestion...

t_ch: 没错！没错！都怪你们！如果不是你们俩提议放生那些该死的机器宝宝……
t_en: Exactly! It's all your fault! If you two hadn't suggested releasing those damned mechanical darlings...

t_ch: 可是，这也是经过了几位一致同意啊？
t_en: But all three of you approved of our idea.

t_ch: 那两个伪善的家伙，脑子里根本是一团浆糊。
t_en: Those two hypocrites are outright idiots.
